geographic_restrictions: Lehigh Valley-based applicants (with projects impacting downtown Allentown)
project_area: arts and culture projects with high community impact and engagement
demographic_requirements: Projects should include and impact residents of downtown Allentown
eligibility_summary: Open to independent artists and nonprofit arts and cultural organizations based in the Lehigh Valley. Projects must have high community impact and engagement, specifically including and impacting residents of downtown Allentown.
